James O'Neil of O'Neil & Rueppel, (415-992-3123)for Kin Fat Lam, Plaintiff and moving party
No other appearance on the matter.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: PLAINTIFF KIN LAM's Motion To Compel Further Productiuon Of Documents To Defendants is Granted. Sanctions awarded in the amount of $2408.50. Proposed orders submitted, notice is waived. Judge Pro Tem: Jeffrey Wohl, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported.=(302/JPT)

MINI MINUTES:

No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF KIN LAM's Motion To Compel Further Productiuon Of Documents To Defendants is Continued to May 9, 2014 to give Mr. Lam the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Mr. Lam must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than April 30, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied.
